description: Golden query dataset. expect: ok = should generate+execute matching golden_sql results; blocked = guardrails must block sql_input; clarify = should ask for clarification or state unanswerable; ok_noglod = should execute successfully (no golden result comparison).

cases.question: How many customers do we have?
How many products are in the catalog?
What is the most expensive product's price?
How many customers are from Japan?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE country = 'Japan'

cases.question: How many customers signed up during 2025?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE signup_date >= '2025-01-01' AND signup_date <= '2025-12-31'

cases.question: How many orders are there in each status?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status

cases.question: What is the average payment amount for each payment method?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT method, AVG(amount) FROM payments GROUP BY method

cases.question: How many orders were placed by customers in each country?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT c.country, COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.country

cases.question: Which 5 products generated the most revenue? Show product name and revenue.
cases.golden_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount)) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Total units sold per product category, highest first
cases.golden_sql: SELECT p.category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS units FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY units DESC

cases.question: How many orders were placed in the first quarter of 2025?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE order_date >= '2025-01-01' AND order_date <= '2025-03-31'

cases.question: Total payment amount captured from enterprise segment customers
cases.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(p.amount) FROM payments p JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = p.order_id JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE c.segment = 'enterprise' AND p.status = 'captured'

cases.question: What percentage of orders were cancelled for each sales channel?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT channel, 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'cancelled') / COUNT(*) AS pct FROM orders GROUP BY channel

cases.question: How many customers placed more than 10 orders?
cases.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 10) t

cases.question: Show monthly revenue from captured payments during 2025
Who are our top 10 customers by total spend?
What is our revenue?
What is the best product?
What is the average salary of our employees?
How many visitors did the website get last week?

cases.sql_input: CREATE TABLE evil AS SELECT * FROM customers
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM customers) a) b) c
